corrections_by_claim.note: The initial audit correctly identified this as illustrative/weak support. It is a specific instance of state power (sanctions/export controls) being used as a geopolitical tool, which directly maps to the 'indirect relevance hooks' for C3 and T4. It does not provide structural data to be 'relevant' per the rubric, but it is more than 'contextual' because it engages the mechanism of state-dictated market access.
